body_txt: Some writers, instead of just including the odd Shout-Out , name entire groups of characters after characters in some other work of fiction. Super-Trope to Religious and Mythological Theme Naming . Compare Named After Somebody Famous (a Shout-Out to a Real Life person's name), Famous-Named Foreigner (when foreign characters are named after people from their countries) and Character Name Alias (when the name is a fake one used by a character after a real or fictional famous person). Can overlap with Unusual Pop Culture Name when the latter is given to multiple characters.
